Attacks.Name: Sludge Bomb
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character is given the Poison special condition and loses 1 power.

Attacks.Name: Gunk Shot
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character is given the Poison special condition. If the target already has Poison, this attack deals 2 additional damage.

Attacks.Name: Pound
Attacks.Effect: After this attack is resolved, this character gains power equal to the damage dealt.

Attacks.Name: Toxic
Attacks.Effect: Choose an enemy character within range. That character gains the Poison special condition and loses 2 power.

Superpowers.Name: Sticky Hold
Superpowers.Effect: This character cannot be pushed or placed by enemy effects.

Superpowers.Name: Poison Touch
Superpowers.Effect: When this character hits with a melee attack, if a wild is rolled, the target also gains the Poison special condition.

Superpowers.Name: Acid Spray
Superpowers.Effect: All enemy characters within range and line of sight suffer 1 damage and gain the Poison special condition.

Attacks.Name: Belch
Attacks.Effect: This attack can only be used if Muk has used a Poison-type attack this game. If a wild is rolled, the target character is given the Poison special condition and all characters within range 1 of the target suffer 1 damage.

Superpowers.Name: Acid Armor
Superpowers.Effect: Add 3 dice to Muk's defense rolls until the start of its next activation.

Superpowers.Name: Memento
Superpowers.Effect: Choose an enemy character within range. That character loses all power and gains the Stun special condition. Muk suffers 2 damage. This superpower can be used only once per game.
